title: Short title
doc_html:
SUBPART B-1. PEER-TO-PEER CAR SHARING PROGRAM ACT

§1300.1. Short title

            This Subpart shall be known and may be cited as the "Peer-to-Peer Car Sharing Program Act".

            Acts 2020, No. 277, §1.

SUBPART B-1.  PEER-TO-PEER CAR SHARING PROGRAM ACT
§1300.1.  Short title
This Subpart shall be known and may be cited as the "Peer-to-Peer Car Sharing
Program Act".
Acts 2020, No. 277, §1.
